description: Configure an Apache Alias for the virtual server 'acmecorp.test' that maps the URL path '/marketing' to the server filesystem path '/var/acme_marketing'. Ensure that the file '/var/acme_marketing/press_kit_v1.txt' is accessible at 'http://acmecorp.test/marketing/press_kit_v1.txt'. Do not use a Redirect. Apply the configuration so that the file loads successfully in a browser.
